violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed an employee not wash hands or put on gloves when handling ready to eat foods.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed the sides of equipment under the hood system had a lot of build up on it.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Hot dogs & raw ground beef at 54F, chislic a 51F (Discarded immediately)
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Floors and walls are dirty
Lighting. — --Lighting in kitchen is too dim
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
